name: the gate rejects a copyleft tool that is not flagged invoke_only
command: mkdir -p vendor/canonical-vocabulary rubric/runners && printf '%s' '{"mirrors":{}}' > vendor/canonical-vocabulary/provenance.json && printf '%s' '{"tools":[{"tool":"hadolint","license":"GPL-3.0"}]}' > rubric/runners/toolchain.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-commercial-license.sh" --root . 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'copyleft-tool-not-flagged-invoke_only' e.txt && echo unflagged-copyleft-rejected 1>&2
